failedAssertions.reason: Bottom tab bar (z-index 50) renders on top of the search overlay (also z-index 50) due to later DOM order. The overlay covers the full 375x812 viewport and body scroll is prevented, but the tab bar at the bottom (~65px tall) remains visible and interactable, partially obscuring overlay content. Fix: increase search overlay z-index above 50, or hide the bottom tab bar when overlay is open.

appliedUpdates.description: Added Flow Validator Guidance sections for curl and agent-browser surfaces with isolation rules
